title: Email follow-up
subtitle: Ask again politely.
overview: A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: I just wanted to follow up on my last message.
我只是想跟进一下上一条信息。
Please let me know when you have time.
How do you follow up politely?
I write, I just wanted to follow up on my last message.
我写：我只是想跟进一下上一条信息。

items.en: I just wanted to follow up on my last message.
items.zh: 我只是想跟进一下上一条信息。

items.en: Please let me know when you have time.
How do you follow up politely?
I write, I just wanted to follow up on my last message.
items.zh: 我写：我只是想跟进一下上一条信息。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: How do you follow up politely?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I write, I just wanted to follow up on my last message.
lines.zh: 我写：我只是想跟进一下上一条信息。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Please let me know when you have time.

items.en: I just wanted to follow up on my last message.
items.zh: 我只是想跟进一下上一条信息。

items.en: Please let me know when you have time.
Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
